location.comment: Azure region. Choose based on data residency requirements. eastus has broadest service availability.

storageAccountName.comment: 3-24 lowercase alphanumeric only. Must be globally unique. Change 'nlppipeline' prefix to something unique.

languageAccountName.comment: Cognitive Services Language API account name.

openAiAccountName.comment: Azure OpenAI account name. Must be approved for OpenAI access in your subscription.

embeddingDeploymentName.comment: Name of the ada-002 deployment. Must match OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT env var and functions.bicep.

functionAppName.comment: Function App name. Must be globally unique (becomes <name>.azurewebsites.net).

searchServiceName.comment: Azure AI Search service name. Must be globally unique (becomes <name>.search.windows.net).

skuName.comment: Search SKU: 'free' for dev (50MB, no SLA, 1 per subscription), 'basic' for production (2GB, SLA).

replicaCount.comment: Search replicas. 1 for dev/staging. Set to 2+ for HA in production.

partitionCount.comment: Search partitions. 1 is sufficient for up to ~50K articles at basic tier.

pricingTier.comment: Databricks tier: 'standard' or 'premium'. Premium required for Delta Live Tables and row-level security.

logicAppName.comment: Logic App name for the NewsAPI ingestion workflow.

apimName.comment: APIM instance name. Must be globally unique (becomes <name>.azure-api.net).

publisherEmail.comment: REQUIRED: Replace with your email. APIM sends alerts to this address.

publisherName.comment: Organisation name shown in the APIM developer portal.

purviewAccountName.comment: Purview account name. Must be globally unique.

ingestCategories.comment: Comma-separated NewsAPI categories. Must match INGEST_CATEGORIES env var and Logic App ingestCategories param. Add categories here to expand coverage — rate limit is 100 req/day so max 25 categories at 4 polls/day.

tenantId.comment: REQUIRED: Azure AD tenant ID for JWT validation in APIM inbound policy.

apiAppIdUri.comment: REQUIRED: Azure AD application ID URI for JWT audience validation. Create an App Registration for the Search API first.

searchIndexName.comment: Must match SEARCH_INDEX_NAME env var and search/index-schema.json name field.

secretsComment.comment: The following parameters are @secure() in Bicep and must be passed at deploy time via --parameters flag or Key Vault references, NOT stored here: storageConnectionString, appInsightsInstrumentationKey, newsApiKey, languageApiKey, openAiApiKey, searchApiKey, hashFunctionKey, searchApiFunctionKey, nlpTriggerFunctionKey, auditLoggerFunctionKey, hashFunctionKey. See deployment.md for Key Vault reference pattern.
